name: Crispy Scallops with Soy Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, whisk together the egg white.
2. Place the toasted sesame oil in another shallow dish.
3. Combine the reduced sodium soy sauce with the breadcrumbs, sesame seeds, and ground ginger in a third dish.
4. Coat each scallop slice in the egg mixture, then dip into the sesame oil.
5. Press the coated scallops into the seasoned breadcrumb mixture until fully covered.
6. Heat Canola oil (approximately 350°F/175°C) in a large skillet or wok.
7. Cook the coated scallops for about 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately with the soy dipping sauce.
